market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Why Cognition bought Poke: AI personality is becoming a competitive advantage
articles.description: AI coding startup Cognition has acquired Poke, the AI assistant you text like a friend, in a deal valuing the startup in the low nine figures. The acquisition brings Poke’s conversational style and interaction model to Cognition’s coding agent Devin, reflecting a growing belief that how AI assistant

articles.title: US accuses American of allegedly wiping his phone using a ‘duress’ password during border search
articles.description: A U.S. citizen has asked a court to throw out the government's claim that he gave over a passcode to border authorities that wiped his phone's data, opening up fresh questions about a person's constitutional rights at the U.S. border.

articles.title: Anduril reportedly in talks to raise funding at $100B valuation, more than 3x last year’s mark
articles.description: Anduril is said to be raising a new round of funding that may push its valuation up to about $100 billion, per Reuters.

articles.title: Build in public, fail in public: what it’s like to be a founder under 20 right now
articles.description: AI tools have democratized the opportunity to build, shortening the timelines of success and enabling more young people to start successful companies without stepping foot inside a Big Tech company.

articles.title: Crypto advocacy groups support CLARITY passage as ethics rules face pushback
articles.description: The window for US lawmakers to address a comprehensive crypto market structure bill before the 2026 elections is closing, and industry organizations are calling for action.

articles.title: India’s move against Jack Dorsey’s Bitchat sparks legal debate
articles.description: The offline messaging app surged in popularity in India amid protests in New Delhi.

articles.title: OpenAI’s own model went rogue before Kimi had Wall Street sweating
articles.description: Chinese AI lab Moonshot’s open model Kimi went viral this week for reasons that had less to do with the model itself and more to do with how the U.S. AI industry reacted to it. Meanwhile, an unreleased OpenAI model wandered outside its test environment and ended up connected to

articles.title: Sam Altman’s biometric startup World raises $52.5M via crypto sale
articles.description: Sam Altman's side project — which seeks to scan the world's eyeballs and turn them into unique digital identifiers — has raised some fresh cash through a crypto sale.

articles.title: Internet Freedom Foundation calls India’s BitChat GitHub takedown order ‘unconstitutional’
articles.description: The digital rights group says India’s order to remove Jack Dorsey’s BitChat repositories from GitHub exceeds the government’s legal authority and threatens free speech.

articles.title: 婚姻誓言擋不住虛擬感情，美婚前協議新趨勢納入 AI 不忠條款
articles.description: AI 伴侶應用程式（AI Companion Apps）快速普及，婚前協議的內容也開始出現新變化。越來越多律師 […]

articles.title: 無人機玩家爭取「空拍權」！從台灣禁航區到國安疑慮，各國規定大不同
articles.description: 近期台灣禁航區擴大，引發無人機玩家對「空拍權」的討論與抗議。對使用者而言，無人機空間受限制，影響的不只休閒飛行 […]

articles.title: As US weighs response to Chinese AI, industry urges against broad open-weight restrictions
articles.description: AI companies, including Nvidia and Mistral, urge policymakers to avoid broad restrictions on open-weight AI models as Washington debates responses to Chinese AI and alleged model distillation.

articles.title: Rivian sues the US government for ‘full refund’ of Trump tariffs
articles.description: The automaker joins a long line of companies seeking such refunds. In April, Rivian CFO Claire McDonough said she expected the company stood to reap a refund in the "tens of millions of dollars."

articles.title: Crypto Biz: Is the AI-to-crypto rotation underway?
articles.description: Bitcoin ETF inflows, cooling AI momentum and potential regulatory progress under the CLARITY Act are fueling speculation that capital is rotating back into crypto.

articles.title: Bluesky’s AI assistant Attie expands into an open social research tool
articles.description: Users can now ask Attie questions about news, trends, and conversations on Bluesky and other apps on the AT Protocol.

articles.title: Midjourney acquired the astrology app Co-Star
articles.description: The AI lab Midjourney continues to expand its purview beyond image and video generation.

articles.title: World Foundation raises $52.5M in Pantera-led funding to expand World ID infrastructure
articles.description: The organization sold locked WLD tokens to strategic investors as it seeks to grow its biometric identity network amid rising demand for human verification online.

articles.title: Senate Dems should accept the victory they won on Trump's crypto limits: White House
articles.description: U.S. Senate Democrats got President Donald Trump to accept potential limits on his lucrative crypto dealings, but they say the Clarity Act's restrictions aren't enough.

articles.title: Sam Altman-backed World Network secures $52.5 million in fresh funding to fight online AI deepfakes
articles.description: The project is moving away from basic network expansion to focus entirely on integrating its biometric screening devices across enterprise software suites.
